query:
CREATE TABLE `stem_split_usage` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`year` int NOT NULL,
	`month` int NOT NULL,
	`count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `stem_split_usage_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2NoQxNASu25QqFj.root --database frNnwU2pwLKJifDR8KqR7c --execute CREATE TABLE `stem_split_usage` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`year` int NOT NULL,
	`month` int NOT NULL,
	`count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `stem_split_usage_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
